productDisplayName: Fila Men Performance Ankel  White Socks
description: Specially engineered to offer maximum performance and exemplary comfort, these ankle socks from fila make for a great buy for those who never compromise on style and luxury. Made of soft cotton fibre blend fabric for a snug and secure Fit, durability and stretchable comfort Engineered with an Air Channel system to keep the feet dry and comfortable Terry base footbed with power cushioning to absorb shock and impact, offering non-stop comfort Cushioned heel for impact protection Comfort grip at the cuff to ensure a soft grip around the ankle Soft seam at the toe region for abrasion-free and enhanced comfort Brand name printed on the cuff Striped design along the sock in the brand's signature colours Sock care Machine wash in warm water using a mild detergent Use non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low in a delicate cycle Do not iron
